user_prompt: X3 mobile game activity background art, 2D semi-painted illustration, vibrant fantasy colors, soft cinematic lighting, clean focal composition, high detail. BRIGHT sunlit shallow-sea diving theme (NOT a dark abyss, NOT lovecraftian, NOT gloomy). Palette: ocean blue, light cyan, teal-green, treasure gold, pearl white, warm sunlight orange. Motifs: light caustics / god-rays, rising bubbles, fish schools, coral, pearls, seashells. Use reference image 1 ONLY for the spatial composition / framing (ERASE its summer colors, theme and any UI). Scene: a cozy voyage tavern interior — sea charts pinned on the wall, ale barrels, a ship's wheel, a round porthole revealing bright deep-sea life outside, warm lantern lighting, a treasure chest and pearls on the wooden counter. ABSOLUTELY NO people, NO characters, NO human figures, NO portrait, NO person of any kind — environment scene ONLY. Output ONLY the painted background scene. NO UI buttons, NO text, NO numbers, NO reward panels, NO progress bars, NO frames, NO watermark.
